label: Admin / Plant Library
items: Plant Library care guide — plant type and cycle dropdowns now render whatever the row actually stores, even when the AI returned a value outside our short canonical list (Herb, Succulent, Climber, etc). Previously these dropdowns silently showed blank when the stored value wasn't one of the five-or-so hard-coded options.

Plant Library seed prompt — now includes preferred values for plant_type, cycle, watering, care_level, growth_rate, and maintenance, so the AI tends toward our canonical vocabulary while staying free to pick a closer descriptor when none fit.
